CVE-2020-8955.title: irc_mode_channel_update in plugins/irc/irc-mode.c in WeeChat thro ...
CVE-2020-8955.summary: irc_mode_channel_update in plugins/irc/irc-mode.c in WeeChat through 2.7 allows remote attackers to cause a denial of service (buffer overflow and application crash) or possibly have unspecified other impact via a malformed IRC message 324 (channel mode).

CVE-2020-9759.title: A Vulnerability of LG Electronic web OS TV Emulator could allow a ...
CVE-2020-9759.summary: A Vulnerability of LG Electronic web OS TV Emulator could allow an attacker to escalate privileges and overwrite certain files. This vulnerability is due to wrong environment setting. An attacker could exploit this vulnerability through crafted configuration files and executable files.

CVE-2020-9760.title: An issue was discovered in WeeChat before 2.7.1 (0.3.4 to 2.7 are ...
CVE-2020-9760.summary: An issue was discovered in WeeChat before 2.7.1 (0.3.4 to 2.7 are affected). When a new IRC message 005 is received with longer nick prefixes, a buffer overflow and possibly a crash can happen when a new mode is set for a nick.

CVE-2021-40516.title: WeeChat before 3.2.1 allows remote attackers to cause a denial of ...
CVE-2021-40516.summary: WeeChat before 3.2.1 allows remote attackers to cause a denial of service (crash) via a crafted WebSocket frame that trigger an out-of-bounds read in plugins/relay/relay-websocket.c in the Relay plugin.

CVE-2022-28352.title: WeeChat (aka Wee Enhanced Environment for Chat) 3.2 to 3.4 before ...
CVE-2022-28352.summary: WeeChat (aka Wee Enhanced Environment for Chat) 3.2 to 3.4 before 3.4.1 does not properly verify the TLS certificate of the server, after certain GnuTLS options are changed, which allows man-in-the-middle attackers to spoof a TLS chat server via an arbitrary certificate. NOTE: this only affects situations where weechat.network.gnutls_ca_system or weechat.network.gnutls_ca_user is changed without a WeeChat restart.

CVE-2024-46613.title: WeeChat before 4.4.2 has an integer overflow and resultant buffer ...
CVE-2024-46613.summary: WeeChat before 4.4.2 has an integer overflow and resultant buffer overflow at core/core-string.c when there are more than two billion items in a list. This affects string_free_split_shared , string_free_split, string_free_split_command, and string_free_split_tags.
